ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 无（使用当前文件的目录）

ast.name: error
ast.source: CRITICAL: Summary section still missing after all attempts!
ast.target: 严重错误：所有尝试后摘要部分仍然缺失！

ast.name: error
ast.target: 提交按钮处理程序中出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which file formats should be available in the transcript creation modal
ast.target: 选择在转录文本创建模态框中应提供哪些文件格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which saved directory to use by default when creating new transcript files. Leave as 'None' to use the current file's directory.
ast.target: 选择创建新转录文本文件时默认使用的已保存目录。保留为“无”以使用当前文件的目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add directories to the list. These will appear in the modal dropdown when creating new transcript files.
ast.target: 向列表中添加目录。这些目录将在创建新转录文本文件时出现在模态框下拉菜单中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the modal will default to creating a new markdown file instead of inserting into the current file (can be overridden in the modal.  If PDF is selected as output format, this setting is ignored, as PDF files will always be created.)
ast.target: 启用后，模态框将默认创建新的 Markdown 文件，而不是插入到当前文件中（可以在模态框中覆盖此设置。如果选择 PDF 作为输出格式，则此设置将被忽略，因为 PDF 文件将始终被创建。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for note file names. Supports {VideoName} and {ChannelName} variables.
ast.target: 笔记文件名的模板。支持 {VideoName} 和 {ChannelName} 变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the video URL will be included in the transcript (can be overridden in the modal)
ast.target: 启用后，视频网址将包含在转录文本中（可以在模态框中覆盖此设置）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled and an LLM provider is selected, generate a summary of the video (can be overridden in the modal)
ast.target: 启用后，并且选择了 LLM 提供商，将生成视频摘要（可以在模态框中覆盖此设置）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, notes will be tagged with the YouTube channel name (can be overridden in the modal)
ast.target: 启用后，笔记将使用 YouTube 频道名称进行标记（可以在模态框中覆盖此设置）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the transcript will be kept on a single line without line breaks. Timestamps (if enabled) will be inline. Useful for compact formatting or when copying to other applications.
ast.target: 启用后，转录文本将保持在单行中，不换行。时间戳（如果启用）将内联显示。适用于紧凑格式化或复制到其他应用程序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin reads the clipboard to prefill the URL field when the modal opens, and powers the "Fetch from clipboard" command. Disable if you prefer the plugin never accesses the clipboard.
ast.target: 启用后，插件会在模态框打开时读取剪贴板以预填充网址字段，并支持“从剪贴板获取”命令。如果您不希望插件访问剪贴板，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, creating a transcript will be blocked if a note already exists with a matching value in the frontmatter property below
ast.target: 启用后，如果笔记已存在且与下方前置元数据属性中的值匹配，则创建转录文本将被阻止。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The frontmatter property used to detect duplicates. Defaults to "url", which the plugin writes automatically.
ast.target: 用于检测重复项的前置元数据属性。默认为“url”，插件会自动写入此属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, timestamps will be included in transcripts as clickable links to the video at that time
ast.target: 启用后，时间戳将作为指向视频该时间点的可点击链接包含在转录文本中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to show timestamps: 0 = every sentence, >0 = every N seconds (e.g., 30 = every 30 seconds)
ast.target: 显示时间戳的频率：0 = 每句话，>0 = 每 N 秒（例如，30 = 每 30 秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, timestamps will be preserved in LLM-processed transcripts. When disabled, timestamps are removed before LLM processing.
ast.target: 启用后，时间戳将在 LLM 处理的转录文本中保留。禁用后，时间戳将在 LLM 处理前被移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filesystem directory where local video files are stored. If set, timestamp links will point to local files (file:///path/video-id.mp4?t=SECONDS) instead of YouTube URLs. Leave empty to use YouTube URLs.
ast.target: 存储本地视频文件的文件系统目录。如果设置，时间戳链接将指向本地文件（file:///path/video-id.mp4?t=SECONDS）而不是 YouTube 网址。留空以使用 YouTube 网址。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, a cover note will be created for PDF and/or SRT files
ast.target: 启用后，将为 PDF 和/或 SRT 文件创建封面笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Location/path where cover notes should be created. Leave empty to use the same location as the PDF/SRT files. Supports '{ChannelName}' and '{VideoName}' template variables
ast.target: 创建封面笔记的位置/路径。留空以使用与 PDF/SRT 文件相同的位置。支持 '{ChannelName}' 和 '{VideoName}' 模板变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder name used to nest PDF and SRT files under the cover note location. Leave empty to use the video title as the folder name.
ast.target: 用于将 PDF 和 SRT 文件嵌套在封面笔记位置下的文件夹名称。留空以使用视频标题作为文件夹名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for SRT file names. Supports {VideoName} and {ChannelName} variables.
ast.target: SRT 文件名的模板。支持 {VideoName} 和 {ChannelName} 变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for cover note file names. Supports {VideoName} and {ChannelName}. Default: {VideoName}
ast.target: 封面笔记文件名的模板。支持 {VideoName} 和 {ChannelName}。默认：{VideoName}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, transcripts will be processed by the selected LLM provider to clean up and format the content
ast.target: 启用后，转录文本将由所选的 LLM 提供商进行处理，以清理和格式化内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which LLM provider to use for transcript processing
ast.target: 选择用于转录处理的LLM提供商

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your OpenAI API key for processing transcripts (get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
ast.target: 用于处理转录的OpenAI API密钥（可在https://platform.openai.com/api-keys获取）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google Gemini API key for processing transcripts (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)
ast.target: 用于处理转录的Google Gemini API密钥（可在https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey获取）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Anthropic Claude API key for processing transcripts (get one at https://console.anthropic.com/)
ast.target: 用于处理转录的Anthropic Claude API密钥（可在https://console.anthropic.com/获取）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the Claude model ID to use for transcript processing. Examples: claude-opus-4-1-20250805, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, or simplified versions like claude-opus-4, claude-sonnet-4, claude-haiku-4-5. Only Claude version 4 models are supported.
ast.target: 输入用于转录处理的Claude模型ID。示例：claude-opus-4-1-20250805、claude-sonnet-4-20250514、claude-haiku-4-5-20251001，或简化版本如claude-opus-4、claude-sonnet-4、claude-haiku-4-5。仅支持Claude第4版模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prompt sent to the LLM for processing the transcript
ast.target: 发送给LLM用于处理转录的提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Timeout for LLM API requests in minutes (default: 1 minute / 60 seconds)
ast.target: LLM API请求超时时间（分钟）（默认：1分钟/60秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the LLM will be instructed to output in the same language as the selected transcript language. This ensures the processed transcript matches the original language.
ast.target: 启用后，LLM将被指示以所选转录语言相同的语言输出。这确保处理后的转录与原始语言匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add custom LLM providers (e.g., OpenRouter, Ollama, local models). These providers must use OpenAI-compatible API format.
ast.target: 添加自定义LLM提供商（例如OpenRouter、Ollama、本地模型）。这些提供商必须使用与OpenAI兼容的API格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the OpenAI model to use for transcript processing
ast.target: 选择用于转录处理的OpenAI模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the Gemini model to use for transcript processing
ast.target: 选择用于转录处理的Gemini模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A friendly name for this provider (e.g., 'OpenRouter', 'Ollama')
ast.target: 此提供商的友好名称（例如'OpenRouter'、'Ollama'）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Full URL to the API endpoint (e.g., https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your API key for this provider

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 请求超时时间（分钟）（默认：1）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add custom HTTP headers (e.g., HTTP-Referer, X-Title for OpenRouter)

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Summary section detected in response but not found in final transcript. Reconstructing...
ast.target: 在响应中检测到摘要部分，但在最终转录中未找到。正在重建...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: LLM response did not follow expected format with Summary and Transcript sections
ast.target: LLM响应未遵循包含摘要和转录部分的预期格式

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Summary was requested but not found in LLM response. Adding fallback summary.
ast.target: 请求了摘要但在LLM响应中未找到。正在添加备用摘要。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Summary was requested but not found. Response preview:
ast.target: 请求了摘要但未找到。响应预览：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to create cover note directory, using attachment directory:
ast.target: 创建封面笔记目录失败，正在使用附件目录：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: LLM processing complete (summary may be missing)
ast.target: LLM处理完成（摘要可能缺失）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenAI processing requested but API key is not configured. Using raw transcript instead.
ast.target: 请求了OpenAI处理但API密钥未配置。正在改用原始转录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（已跳过OpenAI处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Still rate limited. Using raw transcript instead.
ast.target: 仍处于速率限制中。正在改用原始转录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Using raw transcript (OpenAI processing skipped due to rate limit)
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（因速率限制已跳过OpenAI处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Gemini processing requested but API key is not configured. Using raw transcript instead.
ast.target: 请求了Gemini处理但API密钥未配置。正在改用原始转录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（已跳过Gemini处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Using raw transcript (Gemini processing skipped due to rate limit)
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（因速率限制已跳过Gemini处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude processing requested but API key is not configured. Using raw transcript instead.
ast.target: 请求了Claude处理但API密钥未配置。正在改用原始转录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（已跳过Claude处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Using raw transcript (Claude processing skipped due to rate limit)
ast.target: 正在使用原始转录（因速率限制已跳过Claude处理）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one file format
ast.target: 请至少选择一种文件格式

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill in all required fields (name, endpoint, API key, model)
ast.target: 请填写所有必填字段（名称、端点、API密钥、模型）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clipboard access is disabled. Enable it in Settings → YouTube Transcript Settings.
ast.target: 剪贴板访问已禁用。请在设置 → YouTube转录设置中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No YouTube URLs found in clipboard. Please copy a valid YouTube URL or video ID.
ast.target: 剪贴板中未找到YouTube URL。请复制有效的YouTube URL或视频ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clipboard access denied. Please grant clipboard permissions.
ast.target: 剪贴板访问被拒绝。请授予剪贴板权限。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF format requires creating a new file. Please enable 'Create new file' in settings or use the modal to create a PDF.
ast.target: PDF格式需要创建新文件。请在设置中启用'创建新文件'或使用模态框创建PDF。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: SRT format requires creating a new file. Please enable 'Create new file' in settings or use the modal to create an SRT file.
ast.target: SRT格式需要创建新文件。请在设置中启用'创建新文件'或使用模态框创建SRT文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please open a markdown file first

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从剪贴板获取 YouTube 字幕

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create new file (based on video title)
ast.target: 创建新文件（基于视频标题）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 文件格式（选择一个或多个）：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用频道名称作为标签

ast.name: text
ast.source: A transcript for this video already exists in your vault.
ast.target: 您的保险库中已存在此视频的字幕。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No transcript was fetched. You can open the existing note or try with a different video.
ast.target: 未获取到字幕。您可以打开现有笔记或尝试使用其他视频。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have selected multiple file formats (e.g., Markdown and PDF) in a single request.
ast.target: 您在单个请求中选择了多种文件格式（例如 Markdown 和 PDF）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PDF cover notes are incompatible with multiple format selection because each format needs to be created in its designated location.
ast.target: PDF 封面笔记与多格式选择不兼容，因为每种格式都需要在其指定位置创建。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PDF cover notes have been disabled for this request. All transcripts will be created in their default locations.
ast.target: 此请求的 PDF 封面笔记已被禁用。所有字幕将创建在其默认位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: YouTube has changed how it serves transcripts and now blocks unauthenticated requests. This affects all videos universally — it is not specific to this video or channel.
ast.target: YouTube 已更改其字幕服务方式，现在会阻止未经身份验证的请求。这普遍影响所有视频，并非针对此视频或频道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Until this plugin adds authentication support, there is no workaround within Obsidian. As an alternative, you can:
ast.target: 在此插件添加身份验证支持之前，Obsidian 内没有解决方法。作为替代方案，您可以：

ast.name: text
ast.source: All transcript access methods were tried and failed. This can happen because:
ast.target: 所有字幕访问方法均已尝试并失败。这可能是因为：

ast.name: text
ast.source: No directories saved. Add one below.
ast.target: 未保存任何目录。请在下方添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom providers configured. Add one below.
ast.target: 未配置自定义提供商。请在下方添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure a custom LLM provider (must use OpenAI-compatible API format)
ast.target: 配置自定义 LLM 提供商（必须使用 OpenAI 兼容的 API 格式）
